"C:\\Program Files\\PowerShell\\7\\pwsh.exe" -Command "@'
import csv,re,time,requests,html
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
from urllib.parse import quote, urlparse, parse_qs
src=r'CODEX_ENDPOINT/tasks/osm_scanner/grid_discoveries.csv'; out=r'CODEX_ENDPOINT/tasks/osm_scanner/grid_enriched.csv'
rows=list(csv.DictReader(open(src,encoding='utf-8-sig')))
master=list(csv.DictReader(open('pv_within_5km_enriched_b.csv',encoding='utf-8-sig')))
def norm(s): return re.sub(r'["'^a-z0-9]+'"','',s.lower())
known={norm(x['business_name']):x for x in master}
s=requests.Session(); s.headers['User-Agent']='Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/136 Safari/537.36'
bad=('google.','youtube.com','tripadvisor.','booking.com','expedia.','hotels.com','airbnb.','waze.com','mapcarta.','restaurantguru.','wanderlog.','yelp.','foursquare.','pinterest.')
res=[]
for i,r in enumerate(rows):
 name=r['business_name']; q=f'\"{name}\" Puerto Viejo Costa Rica teléfono Instagram Facebook'
 phone=website=ig=fb=cid=''; notes=[]; conf='low'
 try:
  z=s.get('https://www.google.com/search?q='+quote(q),timeout=25)
  soup=BeautifulSoup(z.text,'html.parser'); text=soup.get_text(' ',strip=True)
  links=[]
  for a in soup.select('a[href]'):
   u=a.get('href','')
   if u.startswith('/url?'): u=parse_qs(urlparse(u).query).get('q',[''])[0]
   if u.startswith('http'): links.append(u)
  for u in links:
   lo=u.lower()
   if not ig and 'instagram.com/' in lo:
    m=re.search(r'instagram\\.com/([A-Za-z0-9._]+)',u); ig='@'+m.group(1) if m and m.group(1).lower() not in ('p','reel','explore') else ig
   if not fb and ('facebook.com/' in lo or 'fb.com/' in lo): fb=u.split('?')[0]
   host=urlparse(u).netloc.lower()
   if not website and host and not any(x in host for x in bad) and 'instagram.com' not in host and 'facebook.com' not in host:
    website=u.split('#')[0]
   m=re.search(r'(?:[?&]cid=|ludocid\\\\x3d|ludocid=)(\\d{10,22})',u,re.I)
   if m and not cid: cid=m.group(1)
  pats=re.findall(r'(?<"'!'"\\d)(?:\\+?506[\\s.-]?)?(?:[2-8]\\d{3}[\\s.-]?\\d{4})(?"'!'"\\d)',text)
  if pats:
   p=re.sub(r'\\D','',pats[0]); phone=('+'+p if p.startswith('506') else '+506 '+p[:4]+' '+p[4:])
  if any((phone,website,ig,fb,cid)): conf='medium'; notes.append('Found via Google web search; verify before use.')
  else: notes.append('No reliable contact or social profile found in web search.')
 except Exception as e: notes.append('Search failed: '+type(e).__name__)
 # exact canonical dataset evidence only when same normalized identity
 k=known.get(norm(name))
 if k:
  phone=phone or k.get('phone',''); website=website or k.get('website',''); ig=ig or k.get('instagram_handle',''); fb=fb or k.get('facebook_url',''); cid=cid or k.get('google_maps_cid','')
  if any((phone,website,ig,fb,cid)): conf='high'; notes=['Exact-name match in local verified directory plus web search.']
 res.append({'business_name':name,'phone':phone,'website':website,'instagram':ig,'facebook':fb,'google_maps_cid':cid,'confidence':conf,'notes':' '.join(notes)})
 if i%20==19: print(i+1,flush=True)
 time.sleep(1.0)
with open(out,'w',newline='',encoding='utf-8-sig') as f:
 w=csv.DictWriter(f,fieldnames=['business_name','phone','website','instagram','facebook','google_maps_cid','confidence','notes']); w.writeheader(); w.writerows(res)
print('wrote',len(res))
